input.command:
python3 -c "
import csv
# Check questions resolving Feb 1-7
with open('market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    q_list = []
    for row in reader:
        rd = row['resolution_date']
        if row['is_resolved'] == 'False' and rd >= '2026-01-31' and rd <= '2026-02-07':
            q_list.append(f\"{row['qid']}|{rd}|{row['title'][:120]}\")
    q_list.sort(key=lambda x: x.split('|')[1])
    for q in q_list:
        print(q)
"

import json
# Search for articles on key topics
with open('articles/2026/01/31/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = (a.get('title','') or '').lower()
        if any(k in title for k in ['strategic mineral', 'stockpile', 'norwegian', 'harden', 'clippers', 'league cup final', 'man city', 'manchester city league cup', 'myanmar panel', 'gaddafi', 'supreme court map', 'washington post publisher']):
            print(a.get('title','')[:160])
